# flashduty_channel (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information about a Flashduty channel (collaboration space).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get channel by ID
data "flashduty_channel" "production" {
  channel_id = 6148622168454
}

# Use the channel data
output "channel_name" {
  value = data.flashduty_channel.production.channel_name
}

output "channel_team_id" {
  value = data.flashduty_channel.production.team_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (Number) The ID of the channel.

### Read-Only

- `auto_resolve_mode` (String) Auto-resolve mode: `trigger` or `update`.
- `auto_resolve_timeout` (Number) Auto-resolve timeout in seconds.
- `channel_name` (String) The name of the channel.
- `created_at` (Number) The creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) The description of the channel.
- `disable_auto_close` (Boolean) Whether automatic incident closure is disabled.
- `disable_outlier_detection` (Boolean) Whether outlier detection is disabled.
- `is_private` (Boolean) Whether the channel is private.
- `managing_team_ids` (List of Number) IDs of managing teams.
- `status` (String) The status of the channel.
- `team_id` (Number) The ID of the team that owns this channel.
- `updated_at` (Number) The last update timestamp.
